title: Create Sable Dynamic Lights
description: A bridge between Sodium Dynamic Lights and the Create mod as well as the Sable mod used for mods like Create: Aeronautics
body:
![Showcase Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72591a6434418b50a091dd7861d28171fa4ad189.gif)

This Mod adds Dynamic Light suppourt to create contraptions AND Sable sub levels including in create aeronautics 

Required Mods 
Create
Sodium Dynamic Lights
Sable

This mod is a Client Side mod WITH BENEFITS for servers

RECOMENDED MODS 
Colorwheel - Great mod that adds suppourt for some shaders to have colored lighting from contraptions
Iris - Shader mod 
Euphoria Patches = Shader enhancment mod/ shader works great with colorwheel and this mod to allow for collored lighting off of contraptions
